title: evolvulus sericeus var. elongatus
intro: Evolvulus sericeus var. elongatus, also known as Dwarf Morning Glory, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Evolvulus sericeus var. elongatus are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
